landing.title: Rihla Mate
landing.subtitle: Travel Agency Management Made Simple
landing.description: Manage bookings, packages, customers, and more — all in one place. Built for travel agencies that value efficiency.

bookings.title: Smart Bookings
bookings.description: Create, track, and manage all your travel bookings from a single dashboard with real-time status updates.

packages.title: Travel Packages
packages.description: Design and publish unlimited travel packages with itineraries, pricing tiers, and availability calendars.

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.description: Keep a centralized database of your customers with booking history, preferences, and contact information.

analytics.title: Insights & Analytics
analytics.description: Understand your business with revenue tracking, booking trends, and performance metrics.

hero.headline: Your Own Branded Umrah Travel Platform
hero.subtitle: White-label, self-hosted, and ready to deploy. Give your travel agency a modern digital presence with one command — no coding required.

features.sectionTitle: Everything You Need to Go Digital
features.sectionDescription: A complete platform designed for Indonesian travel agents who want full control over their business.

whiteLabel.title: White-Label Branding
whiteLabel.description: Your logo, your colors, your domain. The platform looks and feels entirely yours — no 'powered by' watermarks.

selfHosted.title: Self-Hosted Control
selfHosted.description: Deploy on your own server with Docker. Your data stays with you. No vendor lock-in, no shared infrastructure.

bookingEngine.title: Smart Booking Engine
bookingEngine.description: Fully automated booking flow from package selection to confirmation. Support for multiple departure dates and traveler counts.

payments.title: Midtrans Payment Gateway
payments.description: Accept payments via GoPay, OVO, Dana, QRIS, bank transfer, and credit cards — everything Indonesian customers use.

license.title: License Management
license.description: Transparent licensing with Ed25519 signatures. Activate once, auto-check-in. No phone-home tracking, just license validation.

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: Track bookings, revenue, customer growth, and popular packages. Data-driven decisions for your travel business.

howItWorks.sectionTitle: From Zero to Live in 4 Steps
howItWorks.sectionDescription: No complex setup. No technical team needed. You're up and running before your next coffee.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.description: Run one Docker command on your server. The installer wizard handles everything — database, config, and initial setup.

brand.title: Brand
brand.description: Upload your logo, set your colors, configure your domain. The platform transforms into your branded travel site instantly.

sell.title: Sell
sell.description: Add your Umrah packages, set prices, and start accepting bookings. Your customers can browse and pay online 24/7.

grow.title: Grow
grow.description: Track performance with analytics, manage customer relationships, and scale your business with a professional digital presence.

pricing.sectionDescription: One-time setup, affordable monthly license. No hidden fees. No surprise charges.

testimonials.sectionDescription: Built for the real challenges Indonesian Umrah travel agents face every day.

items.quote: Before Rihla Mate, I managed everything through WhatsApp and Excel. Now my customers browse packages, book, and pay online — I wake up to confirmed bookings instead of missed calls.
items.author: Ahmad R.

items.quote: We tried other travel platforms but they all wanted a cut of every booking. With self-hosted, we own everything. The one-time setup cost paid for itself in the first week.
items.author: Siti N.

items.quote: The Midtrans integration is what sold us. Our customers use GoPay and QRIS every day — having that built-in means zero payment friction. Conversion rate doubled.
items.author: Hendra W.

faq.sectionDescription: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.question: What does 'self-hosted' mean?
items.answer: Self-hosted means you install and run the platform on your own server (or VPS). You have full control over your data, your domain, and your branding. We provide the Docker image — you provide the server.

items.question: Do I need technical skills to set this up?
items.answer: Basic familiarity with servers helps, but our one-command installer and setup wizard handle everything. If you can copy and paste a command into a terminal, you can deploy Rihla Mate. We also offer assisted setup for Enterprise customers.

items.question: How does licensing work?
items.answer: Each instance requires a license key tied to your domain. Licenses are validated using Ed25519 cryptographic signatures — no constant phone-home, just periodic check-ins. Licenses are monthly and can be canceled anytime.

items.question: Can I use my own domain name?
items.answer: Yes. You can use any domain you own. The platform supports custom domains with automatic SSL via a reverse proxy like Nginx or Caddy.

items.question: What payment methods are supported?
items.answer: We integrate with Midtrans, Indonesia's leading payment gateway. This includes GoPay, OVO, Dana, QRIS, bank transfer (BCA, Mandiri, BNI, BRI), credit/debit cards, and convenience store payments.

items.question: Can I customize the design?
items.answer: Yes. The platform supports full white-label branding: your logo, brand colors, and custom CSS. You can also modify the landing page templates to match your agency's identity.

items.question: What happens if I stop paying the license?
items.answer: If your license expires, the platform enters a 7-day grace period with full functionality. After that, it degrades to a limited mode. Your data is never locked — you can always export your data even without an active license.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. Since the platform runs on your server, all customer data, booking records, and payment information stay on your infrastructure. We never have access to your data.

cta.headline: Ready to Take Your Travel Agency Online?
cta.subtitle: Join travel agents across Indonesia who've modernized their business with Rihla Mate. Start your 14-day free trial today.

footer.tagline: White-label Umrah travel platform for Indonesian travel agents.
